subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The sword of vain imaginings hath cut down the trees of hope, and the hands of tyranny have razed the houses of justice and equity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد اشجار رجا را سیف اوهام قطع نموده و بیوت عدل و انصاف را ایادی ظلم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
